doctor_turn: Hello, I’m Dr. Lee. What brought you in today?
patient_turn: Uh, hi, Dr. Lee. So, um, I was playing rugby a couple of hours ago, and I, like, tackled someone and, uh, now my right shoulder really hurts. It’s, um, super painful, like an 8 or 9 out of 10, and I can’t move it at all. I'm kinda worried...

doctor_turn: When did the pain start exactly?
patient_turn: It started, um, right after the tackle, so, like, about two hours ago. I mean, it was pretty sudden and, uh, really sharp. I just, I can't believe how bad it hurts...

doctor_turn: Has the pain changed at all since it first started?
patient_turn: Not really, um, it’s been pretty constant since it started. It just, like, hurts a lot more when I try to move it, you know? And, um, I also feel some numbness just above the shoulder, which is kinda weird...

doctor_turn: Can you point to where the pain is located?
patient_turn: It's mostly on my left shoulder, but I no, only in my neck.

doctor_turn: Where exactly is the pain located? Does it stay in one spot or does it spread anywhere else?
patient_turn: The pain is mostly in my right shoulder, but sometimes it feels like it's moving around to my back, I think.

doctor_turn: Do you have any past medical or surgical history I should know about?
patient_turn: Um, no, I don’t have any past medical or surgical history. I’ve been, like, pretty healthy overall, so this is all kinda new and, um, honestly a bit scary for me...

doctor_turn: Have you ever had shoulder pain like this before?
patient_turn: No, I haven’t had anything like this before. This is, um, the first time I’ve experienced such severe shoulder pain, and it’s really, uh, concerning for me...

doctor_turn: Are you currently taking any medications or do you have any allergies?
patient_turn: No, I’m not taking any medications, and I don’t have any allergies that I know of. I mean, I’ve been pretty healthy, so, um, I haven’t really had to deal with any of that before...

doctor_turn: Do you drink alcohol, and if so, how often?
patient_turn: Uh, I don’t really drink alcohol. I mean, I might have a drink occasionally, but it’s not, like, a regular thing for me. So, um, I guess I don’t have much to say about that...
I live with my parents. It’s, um, just the three of us at home, and, you know, they’ve been really supportive, but I’m just really worried about this shoulder thing right now...

doctor_turn: Have you traveled recently or been in contact with anyone who was sick?
patient_turn: No, I haven’t traveled recently, and I haven’t been in contact with anyone who was sick. I’ve just been, um, focused on rugby and stuff, so, like, nothing out of the ordinary there...

doctor_turn: Are your immunizations up to date?
patient_turn: Yeah, I’m up-to-date with my immunizations. I mean, I’ve always kept up with that, so, um, I don’t think that’s an issue. It’s just this shoulder pain that’s really got me worried...
